treks.name: Kodaikanal Avocado Hill Trek

current_status.note: Indiahikes is no longer running this trek; the area can still be visited independently.

reason: Heavy rainfall makes trails slippery and unsafe
Low visibility due to thick mist
Waterfall and forest sections become risky

avoid_season.crowds: Long weekends and public holidays can be crowded

highlights: Hilltop sunrise views over Elephant Valley
Tranquil campus setting amidst misty hills

accessibility.travel_time: Overnight journey from most metro cities
